Setting.PowerCoresMaxHint: How many {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCores}} the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Engineer}} starts each round with.
Setting.MovementModeHint: Helm movement model. 'Simplified' uses fixed-radius arcs; 'Realistic' uses Newtonian vector physics with persistent momentum.
Setting.ContactDesignationHint: How unidentified contacts are named on the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.SensorRadar}}.
Setting.SweepGatedPositionsHint: Blip positions on the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.SensorRadar}} only update when the sweep arm passes over them, like a real phosphor radar. Positions may lag up to one full sweep rotation (~9 seconds).

Dialog.FullResetBody: This will clear all combat state including fuel burned and previous movement. Are you sure?
Dialog.EmergencyVentBody: This will vent {heat} heat, reducing it to 0 but start an {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.InternalFire}} ({heat}) that damages the hull each round. Core Distribution will be locked next turn. Proceed?
Dialog.RamConfirmBody: Lock in ramming approach on {name}? This will commit {pct}% additional power and cannot be undone.
Dialog.EndCombatBody: Are you sure you want to end the ship combat? All round state will be preserved in the combat log.
Dialog.OverdriveBody: Redline the drive chambers to surge the ship well beyond rated speed, adding 100% to the power bar for this helm activation. Consumes one {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCore}}. Proceed?
Dialog.FlipAndBurnBody: Fire the attitude thrusters to flip the ship 180°, then burn — the ship decelerates along its original trajectory at 50% speed, moving sternward. Consumes one {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCore}}. Proceed?
Dialog.RamSelectTarget: Select a target to ram. The ship will arc along the projected course.

Engineer.ManageHeatDesc: Spend auxiliary power and roll Engineering to perform cooling procedures. Reduce heat by power spent + SL (min 1).
Engineer.EmergencyVentDesc: Vent all heat immediately; starts {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.InternalFire}} equal to heat vented. Core Distribution is locked next turn.
Engineer.SuppressFireDesc: Spend auxiliary power and roll Engineering to suppress fire. Reduce fire by power spent + SL (min 1).
Engineer.VentFired: Vent Fired, Reactor Offline Next Turn
Engineer.CoresForSuppressionHint: Spend up to {max} auxiliary power. Each unit reduces fire by 1 before the roll.
Engineer.HullRepairDesc: Spend auxiliary power and roll Engineering to restore hull integrity. Costs +1 heat per HP restored. Hull restored = power spent + SL. Cannot repair during internal fire.
Engineer.HullFull: Hull integrity is already at maximum.
Engineer.PlasmaForRepairHint: Spend up to {max} auxiliary power. Each unit restores 1 hull + SL bonus.
Engineer.FluxToChargeTooltip: Spend 1 {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.VoidShield}} Flux to gain Auxiliary Power.

Action.CaptainOverchargedDesc: Set ship-wide modifiers for the round via a new Doctrine.
Action.EngineerStandardDesc: Reduce {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.SystemHeat}} by 1 or repair a minor Glitch.
Action.EngineerOverchargedDesc: Unlock an ally's Overcharged action by assigning them a {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCore}}.
Action.PilotOverchargedDesc: Execute a Snap Turn or Hard Burn beyond normal limits.
Action.SensorsStandardDesc: Reveal enemy Hull Integrity and {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.VoidShield}} status.
Action.SensorsOverchargedDesc: Flood enemy sensors with Signal Ghosts, increasing enemy attack difficulty.
Action.GunnerStandardDesc: Light weapon volley at a -10 penalty to hit.
Action.GunnerOverchargedDesc: Full heavy fire. Spend SL to inflict Critical Effects on enemy subsystems.
Action.OrdnanceOverchargedDesc: Core-powered ordnance action: Priority Loading, Rapid Deployment, or Battle Stations.
Action.PilotStandardDesc: Move the ship at its base Speed along current heading.
Action.PilotStrafeDesc: Activate lateral attitude thrusters to translate the ship sideways without changing heading. Useful for repositioning against a target without exposing the flanks.
Action.PilotRetrogradeDesc: Fire the bow thrusters in opposition to forward momentum. Each unit of thrust reduces the minimum-move obligation by one {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.DistanceUnit}}; thrust in excess of the obligation propels the ship sternward.
Action.PilotOverdriveDesc: Redline the drive chambers, flooding the drive chambers with raw reactor output to surge the ship well beyond its rated speed ceiling. Adds 100% to the power bar for this helm activation.
Action.PilotFlipAndBurnDesc: Fire the attitude thrusters hard over to spin the ship 180°, then ignite the plasma drives — the ship decelerates along its original trajectory, moving forward at half-speed. Requires and consumes 50% power.
Action.OrdnanceStandardDesc: Requisition munitions, launch ordnance, or allocate payloads.

Warning.NoPowerCores: No {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCores}} available. The {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.{{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Engineer}}}} must have cores in reserve.
Warning.ReactorOverheated: The reactor is at critical temperature. Use Emergency Vent first.
Warning.NoUserAssigned: No player is assigned to this role.
Warning.NoAssignableUser: Could not find a non-GM user for that actor.
Warning.WrongOrdnanceType: That actor type does not match this ordnance slot.
Warning.WrongWeaponSlot: This weapon cannot be placed in that position. Flank weapons may go in Port or Starboard only.
Warning.OrdnanceSlotsFull: Ordnance slots are full. Increase the Ordnance slot count in Configuration.
Warning.NoShip: No Ship actor found. Create a Ship actor and add it to the Combat Tracker.
Warning.NoPilotAssigned: No crew actor is assigned to the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Pilot}} role.
Warning.CoreAlreadyConsumed: That role already consumed a {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCore}} this turn. Only one core per role per turn.
Warning.InsufficientAP: Not enough Auxiliary Power for this action.
Warning.BDANotAvailable: Battle Damage Assessment is not available - the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Gunner}} must fire first.
Warning.InsufficientAmmo: Not enough ready rounds for this fire mode.
Warning.WeaponNotConfigured: Weapon is missing Range or Degree of Fire - configure it on the item sheet.
Warning.WeaponNotConfiguredShort: Set Range & Degree of Fire on item sheet
Warning.RepairBlockedByFire: Cannot repair hull while internal fire is active.
Warning.HeatTooHighForRepair: Not enough heat budget to repair hull. Reduce heat first.
Warning.HullRepairNoRoom: No heat budget remaining for hull repair. Reduce heat first.
Warning.AlreadyRolledOrdnance: You have already rolled ordnance this turn.
Warning.AlreadyFiredWeapon: This weapon battery has already been fired this turn. Only weapons with the Multiple Attacks trait may fire more than once per turn.
Warning.FlipBurnNeedsPower: Flip and Burn requires at least 50% power remaining.
Warning.NoGunnerAssigned: No crew actor is assigned to the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.{{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Gunner}}}} role.
Warning.PowerFluctuation: Power Fluctuation: core distribution is disabled while a Core Systems condition is active.
Warning.NoTriagesLeft: No damage control actions remaining this round.
Warning.TriageAlreadyUsed: Already applied damage control to this location this round.
Warning.CaptainTriageTooltip: Damage control actions remaining this round. Each action steps a ship condition down one tier. Costs 10% of max AP per repair.
Warning.CaptainMulliganUsed: Free redraw already used this round.
Warning.NoCaptainAssigned: No crew actor is assigned to the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.{{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Captain}}}} role.
Warning.NoL1Torpedoes: No torpedo targets with at least Lock Level 1 are in range.
Warning.NoDesignateTorpedoTargets: No torpedoes available to designate. Launch an allied torpedo or acquire a Lock Level 1 on a hostile torpedo.
Warning.NoRamTargets: No valid ram targets in range. The target must be reachable by arc within current bearing and remaining power.
Warning.RamProjectionFailed: Could not project ram trajectory. Aborting.
Warning.OnlyComponents: Only Ship Components may be installed on this ship.
Warning.NoBankedCores: No auxiliary power available. Surplus cores convert to plasma at the end of the turn.
Warning.HeatMaxed: Ship heat is at maximum - cannot fire main weapon.
Warning.NoShipToken: Place this ship on the scene before performing this action.

Ram.NoTargets: No valid ram targets in range.
Ram.PopupHint: Hover to preview ram trajectory. Click Ram to confirm.
Ram.LockoutWarning: Ramming disables prow weapons, bow ordnance launches, and helm allocation for the rest of this turn.
Ram.ChatLockouts: Lockouts this turn: Thrust disabled · Prow guns disabled · Bow ordnance disabled

Sensors.LockTier0Desc: Passive contact trace only. Other crew members cannot see this contact until lock quality is increased.
Sensors.ActivePingDesc: Ping a contact to establish Lock 1. Reveals name, bearing, and ship class; enables {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Gunner}} targeting.
Sensors.TargetingSolutionDesc: Upgrade to Lock 4. Reveals conditions and defenses (immunities, weaknesses, resistances). {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Gunner}} gets a bonus to accuracy against this target.
Sensors.SensorDisruptionDesc: Requires Lock 1. Designate one locked enemy. It suffers -10 to all rolls (including accuracy) for 1 round.
Sensors.LockHarmonicsDesc: Requires Lock 1. Stabilize lock resonance for 1 round. Lock decay is extended, but {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Gunner}} lock consumption still applies.
Sensors.SignalInversionDesc: Requires Lock 1. Strip all shields from the closest quadrant of a designated enemy.
Sensors.SensorOverchargeDesc: Requires Lock 1. Apply Sensor Disrupted for 2 rounds: target weapons can only fire within their Auto-scan range.
Sensors.CombatTelemetryDesc: Requires Lock 1. All currently locked targets are upgraded to Lock 4 (Targeting Solution).
Sensors.RadarClickToSelect: Click a blip to select a target
Sensors.FocusedScanDesc: Free action (once per turn). Roll Sensor; gain Sensor base rate + positive SL as Power.
Sensors.BreachAnalysisDesc: Upgrade to Lock 2. Reveals shield percentages per sector on the target.
Sensors.DeepScanDesc: Upgrade to Lock 3. Reveals armour, shield values, hull, and weapon fire arcs per sector. Shows actual ship name.
Sensors.RangeAmplifierDesc: Overclock the sensor lattice: auto-scan range is doubled for 2 rounds.
Sensors.DesignateTorpedoDesc: Lock the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Sensors}}'s targeting onto a hostile torpedo to prevent it from being helmed for 1 round. Alternatively, designate a friendly torpedo to double its speed (movement range) this turn.

Gunner.OrdnanceSLTooltip: Roll Ranged (Ordnance) to generate Gunnery SL for Accuracy, Penetration, and Firepower allocation.
Gunner.FirepowerTooltip: +1 damage per hit per point allocated
Gunner.ArcOverlayTooltip: Spend core: broadcast weapon firing arcs to the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Pilot}}'s display.

Core.Title: Command Powers
Core.CritLocPrompt: Select which location receives the critical hit. The gunner nominates the target system.

ExtendRange.label: Extend Range
ExtendRange.desc: Double the sensor band size for your next weapon attack, increasing its effective engagement range.

ChooseCritLoc.label: Directed Fire
ChooseCritLoc.desc: For every critical hit scored this round, the gunner nominates which location is struck instead of rolling randomly.

EmergencyResupply.label: Emergency Resupply
EmergencyResupply.desc: Draw from ship reserves to immediately replenish 25% of maximum ready rounds.

Gunner.RangingFireDesc: Fires half a salvo at −10 to hit for only 1 ready round. If any shot connects, it brackets the target - granting +10 to hit against that ship with ALL weapon batteries for the rest of the round.

Targeting.Title: Select Target
Targeting.NoTargets: No valid targets within firing arc

Tooltip.ToggleCore: Stage or unstage a {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCore}} for this role
Tooltip.DispatchCores: Send staged cores to their roles for use this turn
Tooltip.Overclock: Overclock the reactor: Engineering test, +1 Heat
Tooltip.FullReset: Clear all combat state. Cannot be undone.
Tooltip.EndShipTurn: End this ship's combat turn and advance to the next combatant
Tooltip.EndShipTurnLocked: All active roles must mark their action done before ending the turn
Tooltip.EndShipTurnNotActive: This ship is not the active combatant

Helm.Title: Helm Control
Helm.RamTooltip: Ram a target, consuming all remaining power and disabling prow weapons and helm allocation.
Helm.WarnNoFuel: No additional thrust to commit. Move the slider forward first.
Helm.EngineeringSLTooltip: Roll Tech (Engineering) to generate Helm SL for Speed, Maneuverability, and Evasion allocation.
Helm.EvasionTooltip: Evasion SL: each SL allocated imposes −5% hit chance on all incoming weapon attacks this round.
Helm.MinMoveMomentumTooltip: Minimum move: {val} {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.DistanceUnitAbbr}} of momentum will carry the ship forward automatically if no thrust is applied.
Helm.CarryTooltip: Percentage of current momentum to apply during this manoeuvre. Remainder carries over to auto-drift at end of turn.
Helm.VelocityBearingToggleTooltip: Toggle velocity direction: Relative (ship heading) / True (north)
Helm.BearingRelTooltip: Velocity direction: relative to ship heading — click to switch to true bearing
Helm.BearingTrueTooltip: Velocity direction: true bearing (north = 0°) — click to switch to relative
Helm.ApThrustTooltip: Spend 1 Auxiliary Power to raise this turn's Power Max by the engine's Power Per AP rating.
Helm.ConfirmNote: Ship will proceed to projected position.
Helm.PilotingSLTooltip: Roll Piloting (Major Ship) to generate Helm SL for Speed, Maneuverability, and Evasion allocation.
Helm.SpeedTooltip: Speed {val}: at 100% power the ship moves {val} {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.DistanceUnits}}.
Helm.MinMoveTooltip: Min. Move {val}: the ship must move at least this many {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.DistanceUnits}} (half last turn's movement, rounded up). Drifts in the bearing direction.

NpcShip.FluxToCharge: Spend 1 flux to gain 1 Auxiliary Power
NpcShip.EngActionUsed: Damage control action already used this turn.
NpcShip.DropTorpedoHint: Drop a {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.Torpedo}} actor here to use as a launch template
NpcShip.DropCraftHint: Drop a {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.StrikeCraft}} actor here to use as a launch template
NpcShip.NoTokenFound: Place this ship on the scene before launching ordnance.
NpcShip.NoTemplate: No template assigned. Drop a {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.Torpedo}} or {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.StrikeCraft}} actor onto the tab first.
NpcShip.StepConditionDown: Step condition down one tier (removes if Low)

Ordnance.AutoArmTooltip: A torpedo is automatically armed every 3 rounds at no crew cost.
Ordnance.AutoLoadTooltip: The {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Ordnance}} auto-loads 1 payload every 2 turns at no crew cost.
Ordnance.RequisitionDesc: Roll Athletics (Might) to generate {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Ordnance}} SL for Efficiency and Expedience allocation.
Ordnance.ChooseSideDesc: Choose the launch direction for the torpedo.
Ordnance.LaunchSidesHint: Select which directions are available for launching.
Ordnance.NoLaunchSides: No launch directions configured. Enable at least one in Ship Configuration.
Ordnance.SelectTemplateDesc: Multiple ordnance types are loaded. Choose which to launch.
Ordnance.NoPayloadsAvailable: No payloads available. Use Load {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.Payload}} to prepare more.
Ordnance.RoleHasPayload: This role already has an active payload.
Ordnance.LaunchTurnLocked: {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.Torpedo}} launched this round — drifts automatically on round advance
Ordnance.NoCrewActor: No crew actor assigned to the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Ordnance}} role.
Ordnance.CoreActionUsed: Core action already used this turn.
Ordnance.LoadAmmoDesc: Reloads gun battery magazines. Restores 20% of maximum ammo upon completion.
Ordnance.ArmTorpedoDesc: Arms one torpedo in the launch tubes upon completion.
Ordnance.ArmCraftDesc: Prepares one strike craft for launch upon completion.
Ordnance.LaunchTorpedoDesc: Immediately launch one armed torpedo. Cannot be cancelled.
Ordnance.LaunchCraftDesc: Immediately launch one ready strike craft, if flight capacity allows. Cannot be cancelled.
Ordnance.RecallCraftDesc: Immediately recover one friendly strike craft within 3 {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.DistanceUnits}}. Cannot be cancelled.
Ordnance.LoadPayloadDesc: Crew loads a specialist payload for delivery to another station upon completion.
Ordnance.GeneratePowerDesc: Crew operates auxiliary generators, producing Auxiliary Power equal to the reactor's AP-per-core value upon completion.
Ordnance.TorpedoSalvoDesc: Expend 1 armed torpedo to launch a double salvo — two torpedo tokens are deployed simultaneously, each carrying a full warhead load.
Ordnance.EmergencyLaunchDesc: Fire a single unguided warhead immediately from reserve stores, bypassing the arming cycle. Carries only 1 warhead — cannot be recalled.
Ordnance.RapidRearmDesc: Trigger the auto-arm and auto-load cycles immediately: arm 1 torpedo and load 1 payload now, then reset both timers.
Ordnance.SelectCraftPrompt: Select a strike craft within recovery range to bring aboard.
Ordnance.NoCraftInRange: No strike craft within recovery range.
Ordnance.RecallCraftRange: Order a strike craft within 3VU to return to bay.
Ordnance.DamageControlDesc: Crew fights fires and seals breaches. Reduces internal fire by 1 upon completion.
Ordnance.HullRepairPartyDesc: Crew welds hull breaches and patches structural damage. Restores +2 hull upon completion.
Ordnance.EmergencyLaunchUnavailable: Emergency Launch cannot proceed: no legal strike-craft launch is currently available.
Ordnance.AlreadyRolled: {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Ordnance}} has already rolled Athletics (Might) this turn.
Ordnance.InsufficientCrewForSacrifice: Not enough crew remaining for this sacrifice.
Ordnance.NoArmedTorpedoes: No armed torpedoes available. Use Arm {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.Torpedo}} first.
Ordnance.NoArmedCraft: No armed strike craft ready. Use Arm {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.StrikeCraft}} first.
Ordnance.NoCraftDeployed: No strike craft are currently deployed.
Ordnance.NoInternalFire: No active internal fire to suppress.
Ordnance.NoOrdnanceInSlot: No ordnance template configured. Set a launch template in the Ordnance tab.
Ordnance.NoTorpedoConfig: No torpedo template configured. Drop a torpedo actor onto the Ordnance tab first.
Ordnance.ConfirmSacrificeBody: This will permanently kill {cost} crew members. They will never return to the manpower pool. Are you sure?
Ordnance.EfficiencyTooltip: Reduce crew cost by 1 per SL allocated (minimum 2 crew per action).
Ordnance.ExpedienceTooltip: Reduce action duration by 1 turn per SL allocated (minimum 1 turn).
Ordnance.CombatRecoveryDoctrineDesc: Begin repairing 1 destroyed airframe (moves it to partial repair), complete 1 partially repaired airframe (moves it to recovering), OR instantly promote 1 recovering craft to armed. Partial craft cannot be deployed and do not advance on their own.
Ordnance.ShockLoadingRotationDesc: Instantly complete one active crew commitment - crew return immediately and the commitment's result is applied now.
Ordnance.MagazineCrossfeedDesc: Divert gunner ammo stores to ordnance: spend 6 ammo for +1 armed torpedo, or 4 ammo for +1 available payload.
Ordnance.DeckConscriptionDesc: Mobilise every available body in the ordnance bays. Gain temporary manpower equal to 25% of your maximum, OR restore 10% of permanently lost crew (minimum 1), increasing the manpower cap accordingly.
Ordnance.CRDNothingToRecover: No destroyed, partial, or recovering craft to act on.
Ordnance.CannotCancelOldCommitment: Cannot cancel a commitment from a previous round.
Ordnance.CannotCancelImmediateAction: Cannot cancel: this action's effect was applied immediately on commitment.
Ordnance.CRDChoosePrompt: Choose which recovery operation to perform:
Ordnance.SLRPrompt: Choose a commitment to instantly complete:
Ordnance.SLRNoCommitments: No active crew commitments to complete.
Ordnance.MCFPrompt: You have {ammo} ammo. Choose what to convert:
Ordnance.MCFInsufficientAmmo: Not enough ammo - need at least 4.
Ordnance.DCPrompt: You have permanently lost crew. Choose:
Ordnance.DCRecoverOption: Restore 1 permanently lost crew (+1 manpower cap)
Ordnance.BayOptimizationDesc: Commit deck hands to streamline the bay workflow. On completion, all active crew commitments are accelerated by 1 turn.
Ordnance.RapidRearmDescSmallCrew: Trigger the auto-arm cycle immediately: arm 1 torpedo now, then reset the timer. The reduced crew diverts freed capacity to the plasma conduits, generating auxiliary power.

Payload.APShellsDesc: +2 armour penetration on all macro cannon attacks this round.
Payload.ScatterShotDesc: +1 shield burn per shot on macro cannon attacks this round.
Payload.LockStabilizerDesc: All lock decay timers frozen for 1 round.
Payload.EmergencyCoolantDesc: Reduce heat by 20% of the reactor's heat capacity (rounded up, minimum 1).
Payload.CogitatorDataSlateDesc: Draw 2 orders immediately and increase maximum hand size by 2 for this round.
Payload.FireSuppressionDesc: One random active ship condition is automatically stepped down - no damage control action required.
Payload.FireSuppressionNoConditions: Fire Suppression Canisters deployed, but there are no active conditions to suppress.
Payload.SensorBuoyDesc: Reduces all {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Sensors}} action AP costs by 20% this round. The discounted cost rounds up to the nearest whole AP.

BDA.Title: Battle Damage Assessment
BDA.Prompt: The {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Gunner}} has fired. Roll now to assess battle damage and retain lock.
BDA.RollTooltip: Roll Intuition (Surroundings) to assess battle damage. SL determines how much lock is retained.
BDA.OpenPopupTooltip: Open Battle Damage Assessment: roll to retain lock and choose a fire correction.
BDA.CorrectionPrompt: Choose a fire correction to apply to the next attack.
BDA.AdjustBearingDesc: +10 to hit on the next attack with this weapon at this target.
BDA.TargetWeakPointDesc: +SL bonus to armour penetration on the next attack.
BDA.FireForEffectDesc: On the next attack, the crit threshold is reduced by SL percentage points (minimum 0%). Lighter hits will trigger a full d10 severity roll.
BDA.CeaseFireSwitchDesc: Grants 20% of maximum Auxiliary Power. Drops the current target's lock to Lock 0.
BDA.AssessmentFailed: BDA assessment failed. No battle damage report available.
BDA.FailedNotice: Battle Damage Assessment failed. Attack information unknown.

StrikeCraft.NoTargets: No enemy ships within firing arc
StrikeCraft.AlreadyAttacked: Already attacked this target this turn

Crit.MaxTierHull: Breach cannot worsen - hull takes {dmg} direct damage
Crit.WeaponSectionJammedDesc: This weapon section is disabled by battle damage

hull.high: +3 hull damage per round (on top of internal fire damage), plus +5 internal fire per round.

coreSystems.high: {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCore}} distribution disabled; AP generation from all sources disabled.

weaponsSensors.medium: One weapon section disabled; sensor offline (lock upgrades blocked).
weaponsSensors.high: All weapons: −20 to hit; one weapon section disabled; sensor offline.

StanceDesc.aggressive: +10 to hit both ways, −1 Speed, −1 Maneuverability.
StanceDesc.defensive: −10 to hit both ways, +1 Speed, +1 Maneuverability.
StanceDesc.redAlert: Each role receives a free {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCore}} at the start of each round; +5 internal fire per round.
StanceDesc.devastation: All outgoing and incoming hits are automatic critical hits.

Desc.inspiredTargeting: +20 to hit on the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.{{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Gunner}}}}'s next fire roll this round.
Desc.overdriveCommand: Grant every role an additional {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCore}}. The {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.{{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Engineer}}}} may take an additional action this round.
Desc.doubleShift: Grant the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.{{SHIPCOMBAT.Role.Engineer}}}} an additional action this round.
Desc.hardOver: Base maneuverability is doubled for this round.
Desc.sensorPriority: Lock Level 1 and Lock Level 2 upgrades cost 0 AP this round.
Desc.acceleratedLoading: All crew commitments advance one turn this round (a 2-turn action completes next round instead).
Desc.holdTheLine: Internal fire deals no hull damage and no manpower attrition this round.
Desc.ventingSequence: Vent 5 heat immediately. Starts internal fires equal to heat vented. No core lockout.
Desc.hardenShields: This round, weapons with the {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.VoidShield}} Bypass trait cannot bypass the ship's shields.
Desc.repairArmour: Fully restore rend damage on one sector, resetting its effective armour to maximum.
Desc.aggressiveDoctrine: Sets stance to Aggressive: +10 to hit both ways, −1 Speed, −1 Maneuverability.
Desc.defensiveFormation: Sets stance to Defensive: −10 to hit both ways, +1 Speed, +1 Maneuverability.
Desc.redAlert: Sets stance to Red Alert: each role receives a free {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.PowerCore}} at the start of each round; +5 internal fire per round.
Desc.devastationProtocol: Sets stance to Devastating Protocol: all outgoing and incoming hits are automatic critical hits.
Desc.standDown: Clears the current combat stance, returning the ship to None.

Captain.LeadershipSLTooltip: Roll Presence (Leadership) to generate Command SL for Inspire, Resolve, and Initiative allocation.
Captain.InspireTooltip: +1 additional order draw and +1 hand size this round per SL allocated. Orders above the base limit of 6 are discarded at round end.
Captain.InspireDiscard: Inspire bonus expired: {count} order(s) over the base hand limit of 6 were discarded.
Captain.HandCapNote: Over-limit orders discarded at round end
Captain.HandCapNoteTooltip: Inspire has increased your hand size above the base limit of 6. Any orders that remain over the limit when the round ends will be automatically discarded.
Captain.ResolveTooltip: +1 additional damage control action this round per SL allocated.
Captain.InitiativeTooltip: Allocate SL to boost the next round's combat initiative by 1 per SL.
Captain.HandEmpty: No orders in hand. Draw to begin.
Captain.FullRedrawHint: Discard entire hand and draw a fresh 6. Costs 2 damage control actions.
Captain.TriageTooltip: Damage control actions remaining this round. Each action steps a ship condition down one tier. Costs 10% of max AP per repair.
Captain.NoTriagesLeft: No damage control actions remaining this round.
Captain.TriageAlreadyUsed: Already applied damage control to this location this round.

Core.Title: Command Powers
Core.AlreadyUsed: You have already used your command power this engagement.
Core.BCNoTargets: No visible enemy tokens on the canvas.
Core.BCPrompt: Choose an enemy to designate as the priority target. All weapons fired at this target gain +10 accuracy, 2 armour penetration, and 2 shield burn this round.
Core.BCNeedLock: Requires Lock 1 or higher to designate.
Core.ESEmptyDiscard: The discard pile is empty - nothing to salvage.
Core.ESPrompt: Choose an order from the discard pile to return to your hand.
Core.CONoPending: No pending stance change queued. Use a stance card first.
Core.DREmptyPile: The draw pile is empty - nothing to reorder.
Core.DRPickPrompt: Pick the order to place at position {pos} (counting from the top of the draw pile).
Core.ICNoConditions: No active conditions to step down.
Core.RAPrompt: Choose which sector to fully restore rend armour damage.

EmergencyProtocols.label: Emergency Protocols
EmergencyProtocols.desc: Discard your entire hand. Clear all Low-tier conditions from every location.

IronCommand.label: Iron Command
IronCommand.desc: Discard your entire hand. Step every Medium and High condition down one tier (Low conditions are unaffected).

BattleClarity.label: Battle Clarity
BattleClarity.desc: Nominate one enemy token. All weapons striking that target gain +10 accuracy and pierce 2 shields this round.

EmergencySalvage.label: Emergency Salvage
EmergencySalvage.desc: Retrieve any one order from the discard pile and add it to your hand.

CommandOverride.label: Command Override
CommandOverride.desc: Immediately promote your queued stance change into your active stance, skipping the normal round delay.

DeadReckoning.label: Dead Reckoning
DeadReckoning.desc: View and reorder the top 12 orders in your draw pile. Blocks your mulligan for this round.

Trait.ShieldBypassDesc: Hits bypass shields entirely - hull damage is applied directly without shield absorption.
Trait.UnlimitedRofDesc: This battery can make multiple attacks per turn.
Trait.ShieldBurnDesc: Each hit absorbed by shields drains this many additional shield flux on top of the standard 1.
Trait.RendDesc: Each hit that gets through shields permanently reduces sector armour by this value - even if armour absorbs all resulting hull damage. The armour reduction still occurs regardless of whether hull damage is dealt.
Trait.ArmourPenetrationDesc: Reduces the target sector's effective armour by this value when calculating damage per hit.
Trait.DevastatingDesc: Doubles (11, 22, 33, etc.) that hit deal additional damage equal to this value, still reduced by the target's armour.
Trait.UnreliableDesc: Roll 1d10 before firing. On a 1, the weapon jams and the entire salvo is lost.
Trait.OverchargeDesc: When fired in {{SHIPCOMBAT.Term.Overcharge}} mode, this weapon generates 2 heat per shot instead of 1 but triples weapon effects.
Trait.HitRatingModifierDesc: Applies a flat bonus or penalty to the hit roll for all shots from this battery.
